tasks.label: append_css_styles
tasks.command: echo '.mainImage { position: relative; width: 100%; min-height: 200px; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .thumbs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; } .thumb { width: 80px; height: 80px; cursor: pointer; opacity: 0.6; transition: opacity 0.2s; position: relative; } .thumb:hover, .activeThumb { opacity: 1; }' >> styles/ProductPage.module.css
